mapper.select:
WITH RECURSIVE ReplyTree (id, root_topic_id) AS ( SELECT r1.id, r1.topic_id AS root_topic_id FROM discussion_topic_reply r1 WHERE r1.type = 1 AND r1.is_shield = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT r2.id, p.root_topic_id -- 将根话题ID向下传递 FROM discussion_topic_reply r2 JOIN ReplyTree p ON r2.topic_id = p.id WHERE r2.type = 2 AND r2.is_shield = 0 ), ReplyCounts AS ( SELECT root_topic_id, COUNT(*) AS replyCount FROM ReplyTree GROUP BY root_topic_id ) SELECT dt.id, dt.topic_title, dt.topic_content, dt.type, dt.textbook_id, dt.textbook_catalog_id, dt.creator, dt.add_datetime, dt.operator, dt.operation_datetime,dt.identity_type, COALESCE(rc.replyCount, 0) AS replyCount, tb.textbook_name AS textbookName, tc.catalog_name AS textbookCatalogName, CASE WHEN u.user_type IN (0, 1) THEN t.name ELSE s.name END AS creatorName, CASE WHEN u.user_type IN (0,1) THEN '教师' WHEN u.user_type IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE '学生' END AS creatorRole FROM discussion_topic dt LEFT JOIN textbook tb ON dt.textbook_id = tb.id LEFT JOIN textbook_catalog tc ON dt.textbook_catalog_id = tc.id LEFT JOIN ReplyCounts rc ON dt.id = rc.root_topic_id -- 与计数结果关联 LEFT JOIN sys_tbuser u ON dt.creator = u.id LEFT JOIN teacher t ON u.id = t.user_id AND u.user_type IN (0, 1) LEFT JOIN student s ON u.id = s.user_id AND u.user_type NOT IN (0, 1) WHERE dt.textbook_id IN
#{item}
